summary: All cross-layer consistency checks pass. Assembly layers match timing tracks, interaction elements align with tool slots A/B/C, continuity entry_transition (550ms) exactly matches timing entry_transition_ms, timing parameters meet all constraints (background loops full duration, tools enter after transition at 800/1200/1600ms, mission text 600-4600ms in first 38%, checkpoint text 9500-12000ms in last 21%, total 12000ms within range), storyboard beats span [0,12000] with proper scene open/close coverage, and all assembly positions within [0,100] bounds.
